resourceTemplates.name: venice-list-characters
resourceTemplates.title: Venice - List characters
resourceTemplates.description: List Venice AI characters with optional filters for category, adult/pro/web-enabled flags, model, tags, search text, and pagination.

resourceTemplates.name: venice-get-character
resourceTemplates.title: Venice - Get character
